ops.title: Fleet rollout: .mcp.json cc-guides-managed + semble removal (24 repos)
ops.description: Plan: ~/.cc-pool/accounts/acct-04/plans/we-had-a-session-radiant-bonbon.md. Root cause: .mcp.json was never a cc-guides artifact; Jun 20 2491b10a fixed only the scaffold template, Jul 14 session 55f86e51 hand-cleaned 3 repos and wrote an overclaiming memory. 24 repos still carry semble (verified 2026-07-17). Approach: mcp-base/mcp-swift shared JSON guides in cc-skills + repo-bootstrap layout FileSpecs, then per-repo layout.toml + render + scoped ship across all lock-bearing repos; daily gets full onboarding; fusekit-f3 (no git) plain edit. Adapt gates from fleet-guides-migrate-fleet.js (session 60dfd1d8): fragments-scoped dirty-tree gate, trunk preflight, ship --bookmark trunk.

ops.text: every lock-bearing fleet repo lists .mcp.json in cc-guides.lock artifacts and cc-guides check exits 0
repo-bootstrap scaffolds .mcp.json as a layout-dir artifact (manifest.py FileSpecs) with tests green and plugin.json bumped
non-semble servers preserved: cc-sentiment tiger, room-scan/swift xcodebuildmcp; bioqa+shlink untouched
overclaiming memory semble-de-exposed-ccx-only.md corrected in every account memory dir
